## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 125]
- API version: [e.g. 0.1.0]

## Logs / Screenshots

Paste any relevant logs or attach screenshots.
